posts.text:
The SAVE Act is going to prevent Americans from voting. We must ensure everyone’s voice can be heard.

Video

Help someone.
Encourage someone.
No matter what’s happening in the world, we can always choose to be a force for good and make a meaningful difference in someone’s life. 

Be the reason someone believes in the goodness in the world.

Video

We have to stand against Donald Trump’s bigotry and his hate fueled policies.

Video

Senator Padilla lays it plain.

Video

The SAVE Act is not about stopping voter fraud, it’s about preventing Americans from exercising their right to vote.

Video

Trump has spent both of his presidencies insulting and undermining our allies, but now he needs their help to compensate for his chaotic and idiotic blunders.

Video

Gun violence is the #1 killer of American children.

This incredible film shows the tragic impact on the grieving families who’ve experienced such immense loss. In awe of their enormous strength in sharing their stories.

Video

Trump’s high gas prices are going to raise the cost of living for all Americans.

Video

Our tax code is broken, but we can put working families first and give the majority of Americans more money in their pocket.

Video

In this moment, we cannot let the Republican-controlled Senate continue to do nothing. We must do everything we can to fight back.

Video

Trump has brought chaos and corruption to our foreign policies and Americans are paying the cost.

Video

Congratulations to Jersey’s own Michael B. Jordan on his well deserved Best Actor win for his roles in Sinners. You continue to make all of Newark incredibly proud.

Video

Encourage someone.
Celebrate someone.
Lift someone up.

In a world where so many are weighed down by life’s relentless struggles, even the smallest act of encouragement can remind someone that there is still goodness in this world and that they have the power to rise.

Video

Important words to remember amidst Donald Trump’s costly, chaotic unilateral decision to bring our country into war.

From Jimmy Carter’s Nobel Prize acceptance speech.

Video

The FCC Chair who spent years fashioning himself as a crusader for free speech is now openly threatening to revoke broadcasters' licenses over their coverage of the war with Iran.

This is state-sponsored censorship. Pure and simple. And straight out of the dictators' playbook.
nytimes.com/2026/03/14/world…

Kristi Noem is gone, but ICE is still acting recklessly and dangerously in our communities.

Video

ICE continues to bring chaos into communities across America.

But we will not be silenced.

Protest. Activism. Questioning authority. These are not crimes, they are the lifeblood of a healthy democracy and a necessary check on agencies that abuse their power.

Republicans in Congress refuse to provide any kind of meaningful oversight or check and balances or hold ICE accountable for their lawlessness. 

I will not vote for another dollar to fund an agency that is out of control and endangering

We need to stand up and fight back against an out-of-control executive. The Senate needs to start doing its job.

Video

Everyone has a story, choose kindness every day.

op: @jayshetty

Video

Jimmy Kimmel lays it plain.

Video
